layout_and_spacing.marketing_hero: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Asymmetric layout where hero image spans col-span-8 and overlapping terminal code blocks span col-span-5 with -ml-16 negative margin to break the grid.
layout_and_spacing.dashboard: Control Room grid. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-0. Strictly use exposed skeletal borders instead of floating cards.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: p-6 for standard inner containers, p-12 for section gaps, py-24 for marketing vertical rhythm.

buttons.primary: bg-[#00E5FF] text-black font-medium hover:bg-[#00E5FF]/90 transition-transform active:scale-95 rounded-none border border-transparent shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,229,255,0.3)]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white/50 hover:bg-white/5 transition-all rounded-none

badges.live: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono text-[#10B981] bg-[#10B981]/10 border border-[#10B981]/20 rounded-full shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(16,185,129,0.2)]
badges.building: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono text-[#3B82F6] bg-[#3B82F6]/10 border border-[#3B82F6]/20 rounded-full animate-pulse
badges.failed: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono text-[#EF4444] bg-[#EF4444]/10 border border-[#EF4444]/20 rounded-full
badges.queued: inline-flex items-center gap-2 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-mono text-[#F59E0B] bg-[#F59E0B]/10 border border-[#F59E0B]/20 rounded-full border-dashed

micro_interactions.hover: Subtle -translate-y-0.5 and glow enhancement on cards.
micro_interactions.building_state: Use a 'Tracing Beam' or shimmering gradient border (via framer-motion or CSS mask) around the deployment card while 'Building'.
micro_interactions.terminal_typing: Deploy logs should appear with a slight staggering/typing effect to emulate real terminal output.
micro_interactions.status_dot: Live status badge must have a 6px pulsing dot (ping animation).

page_specific_guidelines.marketing_landing: High visual impact. Use the 3D abstract background image overlaid with black/50. Massive typography (H1 tracking-tighter). A 'Kinetic Texture' marquee of tech stack logos. No generic 'hero on left, image on right'. Use overlapping bento layers.
page_specific_guidelines.dashboard_apps: Data-heavy, scanable. Grid borders (no cards). Sortable tables using Shadcn, but remove rounded corners and heavy shadows. Flat, rectangular, dense. Include tech badges (React, Node) and 'last deploy' relative times.
page_specific_guidelines.app_detail: Tabbed interface (Overview, Deployments, Domains, Env Vars, Monitoring, Settings). Overview should feature a prominent 'Terminal' block showing latest build logs. Use Shadcn Tabs but style them minimally (border-b indicator, not pill shapes).
page_specific_guidelines.monitoring: Integrate Shadcn Recharts. Use monochromatic charts with the brand primary color (#00E5FF) and a gradient fill (opacity 0.2 to 0).
page_specific_guidelines.billing: Simple, no-nonsense. Hidden WHMCS logic represented cleanly. High contrast pricing tiers using 'Tracing Beam' on the recommended 'Agency' plan.

media_and_assets.icon_library: lucide-react (installed) + @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone for marketing, regular for dashboard)

images.description: Abstract 3D rendering of fiber optic data streams, glowing server block. Use as absolute background in the Marketing Hero section with bg-black/50 overlay.
Macro silicon wafer with green accents. Use in 'Features' or 'Infrastructure' section of the marketing page.
Dark developer monitor coding. Use in the 'Built for Developers' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. No purple/violet gradients allowed.
Enforce flat, hard-edged corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm) to match the terminal/IDE aesthetic.
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' wrapper if it introduces soft shadows and high border-radius. Override Shadcn defaults to match the 'Grid Borders' and 'Retro-Futurism' surface strategies.
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
For the dashboard, use a 1px exposed border grid rather than floating isolated cards to emphasize the technical 'Control Room' feel.
Implement the 'Building' state with framer-motion tracing beam or dashed border animations.
DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Space Grotesk. Rely on Outfit, IBM Plex Sans, and JetBrains Mono.
Make sure to use the provided media URLs. No placeholder image URLs.
